ip_outcome_note: Card name 'Time's Judgement' invokes Chronoa's role as Supreme Kai of Time. Petite female figure with large pink twin-tails, purple/pink deity outfit, and commanding gesture is Chronoa's definitive visual signature — identical character to BT3-113 in this set, confirmed by the vision pass cross-reference and the Dragon Ball Wiki / Xenoverse 2 Wiki character descriptions.

trivia_bullets.text: BT3-122 is the second Chronoa card in the BT3 Cross Worlds booster and is numbered back-to-back with Dark Plot (BT3-121) — justice card placed immediately after the conspiracy card. The juxtaposition is likely intentional: the set structures the Xenoverse narrative conflict as a literal card sequence. [WebSearch: DBS BT3 card list; WebSearch: Bleeding Cool Cross Worlds checklist]
sources: WebSearch: Bleeding Cool Cross Worlds Checklist

trivia_bullets.text: Chronoa's 'Holy Time Judgement' is a canonical attack in the Xenoverse games — energy spheres formed in both hands and thrown to surround and explode the target. The card name 'Time's Judgement' directly references this move, making the card a mechanical translation of a specific in-game ability rather than a generic power event. [WebSearch: Chronoa moveset, GameFAQs Xenoverse 2 board]
sources: WebSearch: GameFAQs Xenoverse 2 Chronoa moveset thread, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: BT3-113 and BT3-122 represent Chronoa's dual presence in Cross Worlds — one Battle Card (her as a unit) and one Event/Extra card (her signature ability). Having both a character card and a named-ability card for the same figure in the same set is uncommon for a Common-rarity character and signals Chronoa's narrative centrality to the Xenoverse arc the set adapts. [WebSearch: DBS BT3 card list]

related_cards.name: Dark Plot
related_cards.note: Immediately preceding card in BT3 sequence; the conspiracy this Judgement opposes

related_cards.note: Chronoa's principal antagonist in the Xenoverse arc

related_cards.name: Quick blade Trunks
related_cards.note: Future Trunks serves under Chronoa in the Time Patrol — same lore faction
